title: Urgent!!! Senior Network & Cloud Security Engineer (Inhouse, Network & Cloud Infrastructure)
description:
Highlights:

  • Permanent job opportunity
  • 5 days work week, normal office working hour
  • Great remuneration and benefits
  • Great career progression
  • Location: East

Responsibilities:

  • Architect, implement, and operate enterprise network security platforms including firewalls, IDS/IPS, VPN, proxies, WAF and load balancers.
  • Develop and govern Identity & Access Management (IAM) policies, roles, and multi-factor authentication standards.
  • Administer and optimise next-generation firewalls such as Palo Alto, Fortinet, Cisco Firepower and Check Point.
  • Deploy Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) and network segmentation across on-prem and cloud environments.
  • Perform threat modelling, vulnerability assessments and penetration testing for network and perimeter systems.
  • Secure hybrid connectivity between cloud and on-prem networks using VPN, ExpressRoute and Direct Connect.
  • Maintain comprehensive security documentation, operational procedures and audit trails.
  • Deploy, operate and monitor cloud platforms across GCP, AWS and Azure.
  • Manage hybrid and multi-cloud environments integrating on-premises infrastructure with cloud services.
  • Automate provisioning, scaling and backup workflows.
  • Optimise cloud resource consumption and cost efficiency through governance and monitoring.
  • Implement cloud and network security controls including firewalls, VPN, encryption and identity management.
  • Investigate cloud security incidents, perform root cause analysis and support remediation and recovery.
  • Track emerging cloud security threats, trends and technologies.
  • Advise and train internal teams on cloud security best practices.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or related field.
  • 5+ years of experience in network administration, cloud architecture, cloud infrastructure and cloud security management.
  • Strong knowledge of firewalls, VPNs, routing, and cloud-native security tools.
  • Strong understanding of cloud security principles, architectures and best practices.
  • Hands-on experience with major cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure or Google Cloud.
  • Certifications preferred: CISSP, CCSP, GCP/AWS Security Specialty, CCNP Security or Fortinet NSE.
  • Relevant certifications in cloud security and information security are highly desirable.
  • Ability to analyse complex security issues and provide effective solutions.
  • Excellent analytical, troubleshooting, communication and interpersonal skills.

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or email to dicksern@trustrecruit.com.sg with provided your latest resume in MS WORD format with below information.

  • Last drawn salary
  • Expected salary
  • Notice period
  • Reason for leaving

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd
